title: Centrifuge Tiers: Reproduced
description: Adds tiers to the Centrifuge from Productive Bees
body:
If you want to put this mod in your modpack, feel free to use it :) If you want to have recipes please install Compressium or AllTheCompressed.
## 1.21: **Tier 1 Centrifuge:** 3x3x3, 2 input slots, 256 Max Stack Size
**Tier 2 Centrifuge:** 3x3x4, 4 input slots, 2x output multiplier, 2x faster, 256 Max Stack Size
**Tier 3 Centrifuge:** 5x5x5, 4 input slots, 2x output multiplier, 3x faster, 512 Max Stack Size
**Tier 4 Centrifuge:** 5x5x6, 6 input slots, 3x output multiplier, 4x faster, 512 Max Stack Size

## 1.18.2-1.20.1: **High-End Centrifuge:** 2x the output, 5x faster than Heated Centrifuge, 1 additional honeycomb slot, Item Max Stack Size: 256, Energy/Fluid Capacity: 100.000
**Nuclear Centrifuge:** 4x the output , 8x faster than Heated Centrifuge, 2 additional honeycomb slots, Item Max Stack Size: 512, Energy/Fluid Capacity: 200.000
**Cosmic Centrifuge:** 8x the output, 12x faster than Heated Centrifuge, 3 additional honeycomb slots, 3 additonal output slots, Item Max Stack Size: 1024, Energy/Fluid Capacity: 600.000
**Creative Centrifuge:** 100x the output, 0 Ticks per Block, 3 additional honeycomb slots, 7 additonal output slots, Item Max Stack Size 16.384, Energy/Fluid Capacity: 2.147.483.647
